programme.desc: Harold Heaven disappears from his cabin in Minden, Ontario, in October 1934; with help from town locals, the 1934 police reports, and his own family and neighbors, Harold's great-great-nephew Mike Mildon and Mike's best friend investigate the case.

programme.title: For Heaven's Sake

programme.title: Val
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the daily life of actor Val Kilmer, featuring never-before-seen footage spanning 40 years.

programme.desc: The relationship between F1 drivers Gilles Villeneuve and Didier Pironi, team-mates whose friendship was torn apart after a controversial ending to the 1982 San Marino Grand Prix.

programme.desc: The referee talks about his idols.

programme.title: The Civil War
programme.desc: How the American Civil War became a crusade to end slavery. The year 1862 saw political fighting threaten President Lincoln's administration and Union general George McClellan's ill-fated campaign on the Virginia Peninsula, where his huge army met a smaller but more resourceful Confederate force. Eventually, rumours began to circulate that Europe was prepared to recognise the Confederacy.

programme.desc: The boxer speaks about the people who have inspired her career.

programme.title: Searching for Sugar Man
programme.desc: Documentary following two fans in search of their musical idol. American singer Sixto Rodriguez enjoyed a brief recording career in the 1970s before fading into obscurity. However, his politically conscious music became incredibly popular in South Africa. Bizarre stories of his death had circulated over the years, but two devotees plan to find out what really became of him.

programme.title: The Body Next Door

programme.title: The Body Next Door
programme.desc: A look at how South Wales police focused their attention on Leigh Sabine, an elderly woman with a deceitful past who had recently died of cancer. Shocking revelations about her five abandoned children and a 1960s manhunt in New Zealand emerged, exposing deep family secrets. As forensic officers raced to find evidence, the investigation uncovered a complex web of lies, leaving the village in turmoi

programme.title: The Body Next Door
programme.desc: Leigh Sabine becomes the prime suspect when DNA links her to the body wrapped in plastic, but she flees to New Zealand with her son in pursuit, leading to deadly consequences. As the investigation unfolds, DCI Gareth Morgan races against time to determine the identity of the victim, piecing together a dark narrative of jealousy, control, and ultimate betrayal.

programme.desc: Brett Morgen explores the Nirvana frontman's childhood, career and death, using material from the Cobains' personal archives.

programme.desc: A look at Earth's most captivating bodies of water. Exploring the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the ocean's most mysterious inhabitants, and journeying across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales.

programme.title: Land of Primates
programme.desc: From monkeys to lemurs and apes to human beings, primates are unique mammals who have taken an extraordinary evolutionary leap. See how they put their brains to work.
